content.think:
用户想要写一个示例函数，处理字符串清理和分块。我先看看当前 diff 中有哪些相关代码可以参考。

让我先检查一下当前的 git diff。

content.text:
diff --git a/example.py b/example.py
index 0000aaaa..1111bbbb 100644
--- a/example.py
+++ b/example.py
@@ -1,12 +1,16 @@
 class Greeter:
     def __init__(self, name: str) -> None:
         self.name = name
+        self.greetings: list[str] = []
 
     def greet(self) -> str:
-        return f"Hello, {self.name}!"
+        msg = f"Hello, {self.name}!"
+        self.greetings.append(msg)
+        return msg
 
-    def farewell(self) -> str:
-        return f"Goodbye, {self.name}!"
+    def farewell(self, formal: bool = False) -> str:
+        prefix = "Farewell" if formal else "Goodbye"
+        return f"{prefix}, {self.name}!"
 
diff --git a/example/utils.py b/example/utils.py
index 22223333..44445555 100644
--- a/example/utils.py
+++ b/example/utils.py
@@ -10,16 +10,20 @@ def slugify(text: str) -> str:
     result = text.lower()
     result = result.replace(" ", "-")
-    # Remove punctuation
-    result = "".join(c for c in result if c.isalnum() or c == "-")
+    # Remove punctuation and collapse repeated dashes
+    cleaned = "".join(c for c in result if c.isalnum() or c == "-")
+    parts = [p for p in cleaned.split("-") if p]
+    result = "-".join(parts)
     return result
 
 
 def chunk(items: list[str], size: int) -> list[list[str]]:
-    if size <= 0:
-        raise ValueError("size must be positive")
-    return [items[i:i + size] for i in range(0, len(items), size)]
+    if size <= 0:
+        raise ValueError("chunk size must be a positive integer")
+    if not items:
+        return []
+    return [items[i : i + size] for i in range(0, len(items), size)]
 
 
 def truncate(text: str, limit: int = 80) -> str:
@@ -32,8 +36,12 @@ def truncate(text: str, limit: int = 80) -> str:
         return text
     return text[: limit - 1] + "…"
 
+
+def normalize_whitespace(text: str) -> str:
+    return " ".join(text.split())
+
 diff --git a/example/cli.py b/example/cli.py
index 66667777..88889999 100644
--- a/example/cli.py
+++ b/example/cli.py
@@ -5,12 +5,18 @@ from .utils import slugify, truncate
 
 def build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:
     parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(prog="example")
-    parser.add_argument("--name", default="world")
+    parser.add_argument("--name", default="world", help="who to greet")
+    parser.add_argument(
+        "--formal",
+        action="store_true",
+        help="use a formal farewell tone",
+    )
     return parser
 
 
 def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:
     parser = build_parser()
     args = parser.parse_args(argv)
-    print(f"Hello, {args.name}!")
+    greeter = Greeter(args.name)
+    print(greeter.greet())
+    print(greeter.farewell(formal=args.formal))
     return 0
diff --git a/example/config.py b/example/config.py
index ccccdddd..eeeeffff 100644
--- a/example/config.py
+++ b/example/config.py
@@ -1,15 +1,22 @@
 from dataclasses import dataclass, field
+from pathlib import Path
 
 
 @dataclass
 class AppConfig:
     name: str = "example"
     verbose: bool = False
-    timeout: int = 30
+    timeout_seconds: int = 30
+    cache_dir: Path | None = None
     features: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
 
     def is_feature_enabled(self, feature: str) -> bool:
         return feature in self.features
+
+    def with_feature(self, feature: str) -> "AppConfig":
+        if feature in self.features:
+            return self
+        return AppConfig(**{**self.__dict__, "features": [*self.features, feature]})
 diff --git a/tests/test_example.py b/tests/test_example.py
index aabbccdd..eeff0011 100644
--- a/tests/test_example.py
+++ b/tests/test_example.py
@@ -1,10 +1,22 @@
 from example import Greeter
+from example.utils import slugify, chunk, normalize_whitespace
+from example.config import AppConfig
 
 
 def test_greeter_greet() -> None:
     g = Greeter("Ada")
     assert g.greet() == "Hello, Ada!"
+    assert g.greetings == ["Hello, Ada!"]
 
 
 def test_greeter_farewell() -> None:
     g = Greeter("Ada")
     assert g.farewell() == "Goodbye, Ada!"
+    assert g.farewell(formal=True) == "Farewell, Ada!"
+
+
+def test_slugify_collapses_dashes() -> None:
+    assert slugify("hello   world!!!") == "hello-world"
+    assert slugify("--abc--def--") == "abc-def"
+
+
+def test_config_with_feature_is_idempotent() -> None:
+    cfg = AppConfig().with_feature("beta").with_feature("beta")
+    assert cfg.features == ["beta ... [truncated]
